scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then bun ../../node_modules/alchemy/bin/alchemy.ts dev --env-file ../../.env.local "$@"; else bun ../../node_modules/alchemy/bin/alchemy.ts dev "$@"; fi' --
scripts.plan: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then bun ../../node_modules/alchemy/bin/alchemy.ts deploy --dry-run --env-file ../../.env.local "$@"; else bun ../../node_modules/alchemy/bin/alchemy.ts deploy --dry-run "$@"; fi' --
scripts.deploy: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then bun ../../node_modules/alchemy/bin/alchemy.ts deploy --env-file ../../.env.local "$@"; else bun ../../node_modules/alchemy/bin/alchemy.ts deploy "$@"; fi' --
scripts.destroy: sh -c 'if [ -f ../../.env.local ]; then bun ../../node_modules/alchemy/bin/alchemy.ts destroy --env-file ../../.env.local "$@"; else bun ../../node_modules/alchemy/bin/alchemy.ts destroy "$@"; fi' --
